_comment: Project-scoped settings shipped with the evolve-loop plugin. The PreToolUse hook below wires scripts/guards/ship-gate.sh, which enforces the v8.13.0 ship-class allowlist: git commit, git push, gh release create/edit must go through scripts/ship.sh (the canonical atomic shipper that internally verifies an Auditor PASS verdict, audit-report SHA, cycle-binding HEAD/tree state). Bypass for emergency rollback only: EVOLVE_BYPASS_SHIP_GATE=1.
